column79: Customer complained that the remaining volume of his purchased package was flushed without notifying him. The RM explained that if the validity expires, the remaining volume will be flushed. After this, the customer suddenly went silent, and the RM disconnected the call without following proper guidelines, which is incorrect. As per our process, we should disconnect the call only after providing three consecutive dialogue within 30 to 45 seconds for a silent customer, which was not maintained by the RM. Therefore, we are considering this transaction as CE.
